title: Lost Cities Filter
description: This mod filters out certain error notifications from the Lost Cities and Lost Cities Modern Tweaks mods, removing them from both the logs and in-game chat for a cleaner experience.
body:
# Lost Cities Error Filter

This mod is designed to improve your gameplay experience by filtering out specific error messages generated by the **Lost Cities** and **Lost Cities Modern Tweaks** mods. It removes these unwanted notifications from both the game logs and the in-game chat, helping to reduce clutter and prevent distracting or confusing messages while playing.

By cleaning up these common errors, the mod ensures a smoother and more immersive experience without altering any core gameplay mechanics.
